onboarding_welcome_desc: Let's take a quick tour to help you get started.
onboarding_fab_desc: Tap the floating button to access the main menu. It's always here when you need it!
onboarding_notifications_desc: The number on the button shows your unread messages. Never miss an important update!
onboarding_ready_desc: Now you know the basics. Enjoy exploring the app!
ave: Rolling average of your personality structure
chat_select_: Choose a contact from the left or visit a user's profile to start a new conversation

error_all_fields: All required fields must be provided.

nothing_found: Nothing found matching your criteria. Try adjusting your search
pass_details: We change passwords manually to ensure security since we do not require email or mobile phones. Please chat us through Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/pantrypoints/ or email pantrypoints@gmail.com or visit our location.
question: Question
to_avail: To avail of this item, please chat the person to meet up
tx_manage: View and manage all your barter transactions
quiz_q1: I often follow my emotions rather than logic.
quiz_q2: Connecting with others on a deep level is a priority for me.
quiz_q3: I enjoy solving complex analytical puzzles.
quiz_q4: I value objective facts over personal opinions.
quiz_q5: Physical activity is essential for my mental clarity.
quiz_q6: I am very in tune with my physical sensations.
quiz_q7: I find myself influenced by the changing cycles of nature.
quiz_q8: I have a very active dream life and intuition.
quiz_q9: I am a quick learner and adapt fast to new information.
quiz_q10: Effective communication is my strongest asset.
quiz_q11: I prefer structure and long-term discipline over spontaneity.
quiz_q12: I take my responsibilities very seriously.
quiz_q13: I strive for excellence and recognition in my creative work.
quiz_q14: I feel most alive when I am expressing my unique talents.
quiz_q15: I am naturally optimistic about the future.
quiz_q16: I seek constant growth and expansion in my life.
quiz_q17: Aesthetics and beauty are vital to my surroundings.
quiz_q18: Harmony in relationships is worth making sacrifices for.
quiz_q19: I am comfortable with confrontation if it leads to results.
quiz_q20: I have a high drive to compete and win.
merged: Your results have been merged with your previous scores
reset_password_instructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
gotopointsbanker: Go to your Points Banker to Reset Your Password and Update Your Details
ppismeetup: Pantrypoints requires physical meetups to verify identity. You have to physically meet the Points Banker for this node to reset your password and update your details.
contact_subtitle: Get in touch with our team
contact_description: You need to visit your Points Banker to change your password and account details, just like you would for a normal bank
quick_question_desc: Our team usually responds within 24 hours
contact_response_time: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 1 business day
update_personal_info: Update your personal identification and contact info

confirm_delete_service: Are you sure you want to delete this service?
